SYSCRG

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x51828000
Size:
0x4f4
Source:
syscrg_rf.rdl

Description

System Clock and Reset Control. Source: TRM Section 3.2.

Contents

Offset Identifier Name
0x000 spll0_cfg_0 SPLL0 configuration register 0
0x004 spll0_cfg_1 SPLL0 configuration register 1
0x008 spll0_cfg_2 SPLL0 configuration register 2
0x00C spll0_dskewcal SPLL0 deskew calibration
0x010 spll0_ssc SPLL0 spread-spectrum control
0x014 spll1_cfg_0 SPLL1 configuration register 0
0x018 spll1_cfg_1 SPLL1 configuration register 1
0x01C spll1_cfg_2 SPLL1 configuration register 2
0x020 spll1_dskewcal SPLL1 deskew calibration
0x024 spll1_ssc SPLL1 spread-spectrum control
0x028 spll2_cfg_0 SPLL2 configuration register 0
0x02C spll2_cfg_1 SPLL2 configuration register 1
0x030 spll2_cfg_2 SPLL2 configuration register 2
0x034 spll2_dskewcal SPLL2 deskew calibration
0x038 spll2_ssc SPLL2 spread-spectrum control
0x03C vpll_cfg_0 VPLL configuration register 0
0x040 vpll_cfg_1 VPLL configuration register 1
0x044 vpll_cfg_2 VPLL configuration register 2
0x048 vpll_dskewcal VPLL deskew calibration
0x04C vpll_ssc VPLL spread-spectrum control
0x050 apll_cfg_0 APLL configuration register 0
0x054 apll_cfg_1 APLL configuration register 1
0x058 apll_cfg_2 APLL configuration register 2
0x05C apll_dskewcal APLL deskew calibration
0x060 apll_ssc APLL spread-spectrum control
0x064 mcput_pll_cfg_0 MCPUT_PLL configuration register 0
0x068 mcput_pll_cfg_1 MCPUT_PLL configuration register 1
0x06C mcput_pll_cfg_2 MCPUT_PLL configuration register 2
0x070 mcput_pll_dskewcal MCPUT_PLL deskew calibration
0x074 mcput_pll_ssc MCPUT_PLL spread-spectrum control
0x078 ddrt_pll_cfg_0 DDRT_PLL configuration register 0
0x07C ddrt_pll_cfg_1 DDRT_PLL configuration register 1
0x080 ddrt_pll_cfg_2 DDRT_PLL configuration register 2
0x084 ddrt_pll_dskewcal DDRT_PLL deskew calibration
0x088 ddrt_pll_ssc DDRT_PLL spread-spectrum control
0x08C - -
0x0A4 pll_status PLL lock and deskew-calibration lock status
0x0A8 - -
0x0B0 d2d_pll_cfg_0 D2D_PLL configuration register 0
0x0B4 d2d_pll_cfg_1 D2D_PLL configuration register 1
0x0B8 d2d_pll_cfg_2 D2D_PLL configuration register 2
0x0BC d2d_pll_dskewcal D2D_PLL deskew calibration
0x0C0 d2d_pll_ssc D2D_PLL spread-spectrum control
0x0C4 - -
0x100 noc_clk_ctrl NOC clock control
0x104 bootspi_clk_ctrl Boot SPI interface clock control
0x108 bootspi_cfgclk_ctrl Boot SPI config clock control
0x10C scpu_coreclk_ctrl SCPU core clock control
0x110 scpu_busclk_ctrl SCPU bus clock control
0x114 lpcpu_coreclk_ctrl LPCPU core clock control
0x118 lpcpu_busclk_ctrl LPCPU bus clock control
0x11C tcu_aclk_ctrl TCU AXI clock control
0x120 tcu_cfg_ctrl TCU config clock control
0x124 ddr0_clk_ctrl DDR0 clock control
0x128 ddr1_clk_ctrl DDR1 clock control
0x12C gpu_aclk_ctrl GPU AXI clock control
0x130 gpu_cfg_ctrl GPU config clock control
0x134 gpu_gray_ctrl GPU gray clock control
0x138 dsp_aclk_ctrl DSP AXI clock control
0x13C dsp_cfg_ctrl DSP config clock control
0x140 d2d_aclk_ctrl D2D AXI clock control
0x144 d2d_clk_ctrl D2D config clock control
0x148 hsp_aclk_ctrl HSP AXI clock control
0x14C hsp_cfg_ctrl HSP config clock control
0x150 sata_rbc_ctrl SATA RBC clock control (not used)
0x154 sata_oob_ctrl SATA OOB / PHY ref clock control
0x158 eth0_ctrl Ethernet 0 clock control
0x15C eth1_ctrl Ethernet 1 clock control
0x160 mshc0_coreclk_ctrl MSHC0 core clock control
0x164 mshc1_coreclk_ctrl MSHC1 core clock control
0x168 mshc2_coreclk_ctrl MSHC2 core clock control
0x16C mshc_usb_slwclk MSHC/USB slow clock (all reserved)
0x170 pcie_aclk_ctrl PCIe AXI clock control
0x174 pcie_cfg_ctrl PCIe config / auxiliary / CR clock control
0x178 npu_aclk_ctrl NPU AXI and config clock control
0x17C npu_llc_ctrl NPU LLC clock control
0x180 npu_core_ctrl NPU core and E31 clock control
0x184 vi_dwclk_ctrl VI digital write clock control
0x188 vi_aclk_ctrl VI AXI and config clock control
0x18C vi_dig_isp_clk_ctrl VI digital ISP clock control
0x190 vi_dvp_clk_ctrl VI DVP clock control
0x194 - -
0x1AC vi_phy_clkctrl VI PHY clock control
0x1B0 vo_aclk_ctrl VO AXI and config clock control
0x1B4 vo_iesmclk_ctrl VO HDMI IES master clock control
0x1B8 vo_pixel_ctrl VO pixel clock control
0x1BC vo_mclk_ctrl VO I2S master clock control
0x1C0 vo_phy_clkctrl VO PHY / CEC clock control
0x1C4 vc_aclk_ctrl VC AXI clock control
0x1C8 vcdec_rootclk_ctrl VC decoder root clock select
0x1CC g2d_ctrl G2D AXI / core / APB clock control
0x1D0 vc_clken_ctrl VC sub-block APB clock enable
0x1D4 je_clk_ctrl JPEG encoder clock control
0x1D8 jd_clk_ctrl JPEG decoder clock control
0x1DC vd_clk_ctrl Video decoder clock control
0x1E0 ve_clk_ctrl Video encoder clock control
0x1E4 aon_dma_clk_ctrl AON DMA AXI and config clock control
0x1E8 timer_clk_ctrl Timer clock enable
0x1EC rtc_clk_ctrl RTC clock control
0x1F0 pka_clk_ctrl PKA clock control
0x1F4 spacc_clk_ctrl SPAcc and crypto clock control
0x1F8 trng_clk_ctrl TRNG clock control
0x1FC otp_clk_ctrl OTP clock control
0x200 lsp_clk_en0 LSP peripheral clock enables (bank 0)
0x204 lsp_clk_en1 LSP peripheral clock enables (bank 1)
0x208 u84_clk_ctrl U84 (big-core cluster) clock control
0x20C syscfg_clk_ctrl System config bus clock control
0x210 i2c0_clk_ctrl I2C0 (i2c10) clock control
0x214 i2c1_clk_ctrl I2C1 (i2c11) clock control
0x218 - -
0x280 dft_clk_ctrl DFT test clock enables
0x284 - -
0x300 sys_swrst_value System software reset trigger — write 0x1AC0FFE6 to reset
0x304 clr_rst_status Clear reset source status
0x308 die_status Die identity and reset source status
0x30C clr_boot_info Clear boot flag (allows CPU re-boot from software)
0x310 scpu_boot_address SCPU reset vector (valid when booting from U84)
0x314 lpcpu_boot_address LPCPU boot address
0x318 npue31_boot_address NPU E31 boot address (reserved)
0x31C u84_boot_address0_hi U84 reset vector [40:32] (valid when booting from SCPU)
0x320 u84_boot_address0_low U84 reset vector [31:0] (valid when booting from SCPU)
0x324 u84_boot_address1_hi U84 reset vector [40:32] (valid when booting from SCPU)
0x328 u84_boot_address1_low U84 reset vector [31:0] (valid when booting from SCPU)
0x32C u84_boot_address2_hi U84 reset vector [40:32] (valid when booting from SCPU)
0x330 u84_boot_address2_low U84 reset vector [31:0] (valid when booting from SCPU)
0x334 u84_boot_address3_hi U84 reset vector [40:32] (valid when booting from SCPU)
0x338 u84_boot_address3_low U84 reset vector [31:0] (valid when booting from SCPU)
0x33C boot_sel_stat Boot selection pin status
0x340 boot_spi_cfg Boot SPI controller mode select
0x344 - -
0x400 snoc_rst_ctrl SNOC / RNOC / NOC software reset control
0x404 gpu_rst_ctrl GPU software reset control
0x408 dsp_rst_ctrl DSP software reset control
0x40C d2d_rst_ctrl D2D software reset control
0x410 ddr_rst_ctrl DDR controller software reset control
0x414 tcu_rst_ctrl TCU / TBU software reset control
0x418 npu_rst_ctrl NPU software reset control
0x41C hspdma_rst_ctrl HSP / DMA / USB / SATA / MSHC software reset control
0x420 pcie_rst_ctrl PCIe software reset control
0x424 i2c_rst_ctrl LSP I2C software reset control
0x428 fan_rst_ctrl Fan controller software reset control
0x42C pvt_rst_ctrl PVT monitor software reset control
0x430 mbox_rst_ctrl Mailbox software reset control
0x434 uart_rst_ctrl UART software reset control
0x438 - -
0x43C timer_rst_ctrl LSP timer software reset control
0x440 ssi_rst_ctrl SSI (SPI) software reset control
0x444 wdt_rst_ctrl Watchdog software reset control
0x448 lsp_cfgrst_ctrl LSP config bus software reset
0x44C u84_rst_ctrl U84 cluster software reset control
0x450 scpu_rst_ctrl SCPU software reset control
0x454 lpcpu_rst_ctrl LPCPU software reset control
0x458 vc_rst_ctrl VC subsystem software reset control
0x45C jd_rst_ctrl AXI + config software reset
0x460 je_rst_ctrl AXI + config software reset
0x464 vd_rst_ctrl AXI + config software reset
0x468 ve_rst_ctrl AXI + config software reset
0x46C g2d_rst_ctrl G2D software reset control
0x470 vi_rst_ctrl VI subsystem software reset control
0x474 dvp_rst_ctrl sw_vi_dvp_rstn, default 0
0x478 isp0_rst_ctrl sw_vi_isp0_rstn, default 0
0x47C isp1_rst_ctrl sw_vi_isp1_rstn, default 0
0x480 shutter_rst_ctrl VI shutter software reset control
0x484 vo_phyrst_ctrl VO / HDMI PHY software reset control
0x488 vo_i2srst_ctrl VO I2S software reset control
0x48C vo_rst_ctrl VO display controller software reset control
0x490 bootspi_rst_ctrl Boot SPI software reset control
0x494 i2c1_rst_ctrl sw_i2c1_prstn, default 1
0x498 i2c0_rst_ctrl sw_i2c0_prstn, default 1
0x49C dma1_rst_ctrl DMA1 software reset control
0x4A0 fprt_rst_ctrl sw_fp_prt_hrstn, default 1
0x4A4 hblock_rst_ctrl sw_hblock_hrstn, default 1
0x4A8 secsr_rst_ctrl sw_secsr_hrstn, default 1
0x4AC otp_rst_ctrl sw_otp_prstn, default 1 (reserved per TRM)
0x4B0 pka_rst_ctrl sw_pka_hrstn, default 1
0x4B4 spacc_rst_ctrl sw_spacc_rstn, default 1
0x4B8 trng_rst_ctrl sw_trng_hrstn, default 1
0x4BC - -
0x4C0 timer0_rst_ctrl Timer0 software reset control
0x4C4 timer1_rst_ctrl Timer N software reset control
0x4C8 timer2_rst_ctrl Timer N software reset control
0x4CC timer3_rst_ctrl Timer N software reset control
0x4D0 rtc_rst_ctrl sw_rtc_rstn, default 1
0x4D4 mnoc_rst_ctrl MNOC software reset control
0x4D8 rnoc_rst_ctrl RNOC software reset control
0x4DC cnoc_rst_ctrl CNOC per-domain config software reset control
0x4E0 lnoc_rst_ctrl LNOC software reset control
0x4E4 pipe_rst_ctrl Top-level pipeline cell software reset control
0x4E8 tbu_rst_ctrl Top-level TBU software reset control
0x4EC reset_status D2D subsystem reset status from opposite die
0x4F0 test_rst_ctrl Test/SPI-slave software reset control
